allow: Bash(python -c "import ursina, os; p = os.path.dirname\(ursina.__file__\); print\(p\); print\('has textures:', os.path.isdir\(os.path.join\(p,'textures'\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import ursina, ursina.main, inspect; print\([l for l in inspect.getsource\(ursina.Ursina\).split\('\\n'\) if 'icon' in l.lower\(\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\) for f in \('player.py','subway_surfer.py','hud.py','world.py','obstacles.py'\)]; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ursina; print\('ursina version:', ursina.__version__ if hasattr\(ursina, '__version__'\) else 'unknown'\)")
